Example_EN: Heavy traffic blocked the busy highway for two hours.
Example_CN: 拥堵让繁忙的公路堵了两小时。

Collocation: hijack a plane;hijack the conversation;hijack a car
Example_EN: Do not let one person hijack the whole conversation.
Example_CN: 不要让一个人霸占整场对话。
MemoryTip: hijack：劫持，也指令人抢走话题。

Example_EN: She put her hand on her hip and waited patiently.
Example_CN: 她把手放在髋上耐心等待。

Example_EN: We decided to hire a car for the weekend trip.
Example_CN: 我们决定租车度周末。

Example_EN: The old town hall is a historic building from 1850.
Example_CN: 这座旧市政厅是1850年的历史建筑。

Example_EN: She prefers historical novels set in Victorian England.
Example_CN: 她更喜欢背景设在维多利亚时代英国的历史小说。

Example_EN: The new song became a big hit within a week.
Example_CN: 这首新歌一周内成了大热门。

Example_EN: She plays hockey for the school team every Saturday.
Example_CN: 她每周六为校队打曲棍球。

Example_EN: Please hold the door open for the next person.
Example_CN: 请为下一个人扶住门。

Example_EN: There is a small hole in my jumper sleeve.
Example_CN: 我毛衣袖子上有个小洞。

Example_EN: Birds nested inside the hollow tree by the river.
Example_CN: 鸟在河边空心树里筑巢。

Example_EN: Visitors must remove shoes in this holy place.
Example_CN: 在这座圣地访客必须脱鞋。

Example_EN: The charity provides food for homeless people every winter.
Example_CN: 慈善机构每年冬天为无家可归者提供食物。

Example_EN: Please answer honestly if you need more time.
Example_CN: 如果还需要时间请诚实回答。

Collocation: spoon of honey;honey and lemon;natural honey
Example_EN: She puts a spoon of honey in her morning tea.
Example_CN: 她早上茶里放一勺蜂蜜。

Collocation: in honour of;honour a promise;great honour
Example_EN: It is a great honour to speak at your graduation.
Example_CN: 在毕业典礼上发言是莫大荣幸。

Collocation: coat hook;hook a fish;off the hook
Example_EN: Hang your coat on the hook near the door.
Example_CN: 把外套挂在门边挂钩上。

Example_EN: We remain hopeful about finding a solution soon.
Example_CN: 我们对很快找到解决办法仍抱希望。

Example_EN: Hopefully the train will arrive on time tonight.
Example_CN: 希望今晚火车能准时到达。

Collocation: on the horizon;broaden horizons;sunset on the horizon
Example_EN: New opportunities are already on the horizon.
Example_CN: 新机遇已经在望。

Example_EN: Please do not blow the car horn outside the school.
Example_CN: 请不要在学校外按汽车喇叭。

Example_EN: We had horrible weather throughout the whole weekend.
Example_CN: 整个周末天气都很糟糕。

Example_EN: She refuses to watch any horror film after dark.
Example_CN: 天黑后她拒绝看任何恐怖片。

Example_EN: They offered to host a party for their neighbours.
Example_CN: 他们提出为邻居办派对。

Example_EN: Everyone shares the household chores on weekends.
Example_CN: 周末大家分担家务。

Example_EN: Young buyers struggle with the expensive housing market.
Example_CN: 年轻买家在昂贵的住房市场中挣扎。

Example_EN: They spent a huge amount of time preparing the show.
Example_CN: 他们花了大量时间准备演出。

Example_EN: Kindness is part of basic human nature.
Example_CN: 善良是基本人性的一部分。

Example_EN: His sense of humour made the long meeting easier.
Example_CN: 他的幽默感让漫长会议轻松些。

Example_EN: Police continue to hunt for the missing laptop.
Example_CN: 警方继续寻找丢失的笔记本电脑。

Example_EN: She is a skilled hunter of rare second-hand books.
Example_CN: 她擅长搜寻稀有二手书。

Example_EN: A powerful hurricane damaged farms along the coast.
Example_CN: 一场强飓风损坏了沿海农场。

Example_EN: Do not hurry through breakfast if you feel unwell.
Example_CN: 如果不舒服，早饭不要急匆匆对付。

Example_EN: Be careful not to hurt your back when lifting.
Example_CN: 搬东西时小心别伤到背。

Example_EN: Walkers slept overnight in a wooden mountain hut.
Example_CN: 徒步者在山中小木屋过夜。

Example_EN: Scientists study hydrogen as a cleaner energy source.
Example_CN: 科学家研究氢作为更清洁的能源。

Example_EN: Students must test their hypothesis with real data.
Example_CN: 学生必须用真实数据检验假设。

Collocation: tip of the iceberg;floating iceberg;hit an iceberg
Example_EN: This problem is only the tip of the iceberg.
Example_CN: 这个问题只是冰山一角。

Example_EN: The star became a cultural icon for young designers.
Example_CN: 这位明星成为年轻设计师的文化偶像。

Example_EN: This quiet street is ideal for young families.
Example_CN: 这条安静街道很适合年轻家庭。

Example_EN: The two apartments look almost identical from outside.
Example_CN: 这两套公寓从外面看几乎一模一样。

Example_EN: Please show identification at the airport gate.
Example_CN: 请在机场登机口出示身份证明。

Example_EN: Doctors need to identify the cause of the fever.
Example_CN: 医生需要找出发烧的原因。

Example_EN: Young people often search for a sense of identity.
Example_CN: 年轻人常寻找身份认同感。

Example_EN: The novel explores the ideology of early reformers.
Example_CN: 小说探讨了早期改革者的思想体系。

Example_EN: Learn one new English idiom every week.
Example_CN: 每周学一个新英语习语。

Example_EN: Do not leave the machine idle for too long.
Example_CN: 不要让机器闲置太久。

Collocation: ignore advice;ignore a message;choose to ignore
Example_EN: Please do not ignore safety advice in the lab.
Example_CN: 请不要忽视实验室安全建议。

Example_EN: It is illegal to park across a fire exit.
Example_CN: 在安全出口前停车是违法的。

Example_EN: She recovered from a long illness last spring.
Example_CN: 去年春天她从长期疾病中康复。

Collocation: illustrate a point;illustrate with;illustrate a book
Example_EN: Can you illustrate your point with a clear example?
Example_CN: 你能用清楚例子说明你的观点吗？

Collocation: book illustration;by way of illustration;clear illustration
Example_EN: The children's book has a lovely illustration on each page.
Example_CN: 这本童书每页都有可爱插图。

Example_EN: The story takes place in an imaginary world under the sea.
Example_CN: 故事发生在海底的想象世界。

Example_EN: Good writers use imagination to invent new worlds.
Example_CN: 好作家用想象力创造新世界。

Example_EN: The medicine had an immediate effect on her pain.
Example_CN: 药物对她的疼痛立刻起了作用。

Example_EN: Please leave the building immediately if the alarm rings.
Example_CN: 若警报响起请立即离开大楼。

Example_EN: Her parents were immigrants from Eastern Europe.
Example_CN: 她父母是来自东欧的移民。

Example_EN: They waited for hours at the immigration office.
Example_CN: 他们在移民局等了几小时。

Example_EN: Online learning has a big impact on student habits.
Example_CN: 在线学习对学生习惯影响很大。

Example_EN: The school will implement the new timetable in September.
Example_CN: 学校将于九月实施新课表。

Example_EN: The decision has serious implications for local jobs.
Example_CN: 该决定对本地就业有严重影响。

Example_EN: His silence seemed to imply that he disagreed.
Example_CN: 他的沉默似乎暗示他不同意。

Example_EN: The country must import oil from overseas partners.
Example_CN: 该国必须从海外伙伴进口石油。

Collocation: of great importance;importance of;stress the importance
Example_EN: Teachers stress the importance of regular sleep.
Example_CN: 老师强调规律睡眠的重要性。

Example_EN: The council may impose a fine for illegal parking.
Example_CN: 市政会可能对违章停车处以罚款。

Example_EN: It is almost impossible to finish this by tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚几乎不可能完成这件事。

Example_EN: She hoped to impress the interview panel with clear answers.
Example_CN: 她希望用清晰回答给面试组留下印象。

Collocation: first impression;make an impression;get the impression
Example_EN: First impressions matter in job interviews.
Example_CN: 求职面试中第一印象很重要。

Example_EN: The team gave an impressive performance in the final.
Example_CN: 球队在决赛中表现精彩。

Example_EN: There is still room for improvement in your writing.
Example_CN: 你的写作仍有改进空间。

Example_EN: Tax cuts give companies a financial incentive to hire.
Example_CN: 减税给公司雇用人手提供金钱激励。

Collocation: an inch of;within an inch;inch by inch
Example_EN: Move the sofa one inch to the left.
Example_CN: 把沙发向左移一英寸。

Example_EN: Police are investigating a serious incident near the station.
Example_CN: 警方正在调查车站附近一起严重事件。

Example_EN: Many students live on a low income during university.
Example_CN: 许多学生在大学期间靠低收入生活。

Example_EN: Please incorporate feedback from your teacher into the draft.
Example_CN: 请把老师的反馈纳入草稿。

Example_EN: Online shopping has become increasingly popular here.
Example_CN: 网上购物在这里越来越流行。

Example_EN: The rescue team showed incredible courage that night.
Example_CN: 救援队那晚展现了不可思议的勇气。

Example_EN: Young adults value independence from their parents.
Example_CN: 年轻人珍视离开父母后的独立。

Example_EN: She hopes to become financially independent by age twenty-five.
Example_CN: 她希望二十五岁前经济独立。

Collocation: price index;index of;look up in the index
Example_EN: Look up the topic in the index at the back of the book.
Example_CN: 在书后索引里查找该主题。

Example_EN: Dark clouds indicate that rain is coming soon.
Example_CN: 乌云表明雨快来了。

Example_EN: There is little indication of a quick recovery.
Example_CN: 几乎没有快速复苏的迹象。

Example_EN: Each individual must take responsibility for personal data.
Example_CN: 每个人都必须对个人数据负责。

Example_EN: The school opened a new indoor swimming pool.
Example_CN: 学校开放了新的室内游泳池。

Example_EN: Children had to stay indoors because of heavy rain.
Example_CN: 因大雨孩子们只好待在室内。

Example_EN: Factories cover most of the old industrial area.
Example_CN: 工厂覆盖了大部分旧工业区。

Example_EN: Tourism is the main industry in this coastal town.
Example_CN: 旅游业是这座海滨城镇的主要产业。

Example_EN: Schools try to reduce inequality among students.
Example_CN: 学校努力减少学生间的不平等。

Example_EN: After days of rain, floods seemed inevitable.
Example_CN: 连日降雨后，洪水似乎不可避免。

Example_EN: Late nights will inevitably affect exam results.
Example_CN: 熬夜几乎必然影响考试成绩。

Example_EN: Cover your mouth so you do not infect others.
Example_CN: 捂住嘴，以免传染给他人。

Example_EN: The doctor treated her ear infection with antibiotics.
Example_CN: 医生用抗生素治疗她的耳部感染。

Example_EN: High inflation makes food more expensive every month.
Example_CN: 高通胀让食品每月更贵。

Example_EN: Parents have a strong influence on children's habits.
Example_CN: 父母对孩子习惯有很大影响。

Example_EN: Please inform me of any change to the schedule.
Example_CN: 日程有任何变动请通知我。

Example_EN: We had an informal meeting over coffee.
Example_CN: 我们一边喝咖啡一边开了非正式会议。

Example_EN: Fresh ingredients make the salad taste better.
Example_CN: 新鲜食材让沙拉更好吃。

Example_EN: Local inhabitants welcome visitors politely.
Example_CN: 当地居民礼貌欢迎游客。

Example_EN: She will inherit the small farm from her grandparents.
Example_CN: 她将继承祖父母的小农场。

Example_EN: The initial plan was to finish by Friday.
Example_CN: 最初计划是周五前完成。
